name: TC-SF-002 — GET /api/v1/fetch/status: All 7 required fields are present and non-null
description:
**What this test does:**
Verifies that the /fetch/status response contains exactly these 7 required fields:
service, status, mockEnabled, tokenInjectionEnabled, accountNumber, apiEndpoint, checkedAt

**Why it matters:** Each field serves a specific operational purpose. A missing field means the status response is incomplete and cannot be relied upon for monitoring:
- service: identifies which microservice responded
- status: UP/DOWN health indicator
- mockEnabled: whether the service is using live or mock data
- tokenInjectionEnabled: whether OAuth token is injected into KCB calls
- accountNumber: the KCB account being queried
- apiEndpoint: the upstream KCB API URL in use
- checkedAt: timestamp of the last status check
descriptionHtml:
What this test does:
Verifies that the /fetch/status response contains exactly these 7 required fields:
service, status, mockEnabled, tokenInjectionEnabled, accountNumber, apiEndpoint, checkedAt

Why it matters: Each field serves a specific operational purpose. A missing field means the status response is incomplete and cannot be relied upon for monitoring:

  • service: identifies which microservice responded
  • status: UP/DOWN health indicator
  • mockEnabled: whether the service is using live or mock data
  • tokenInjectionEnabled: whether OAuth token is injected into KCB calls
  • accountNumber: the KCB account being queried
  • apiEndpoint: the upstream KCB API URL in use
  • checkedAt: timestamp of the last status check
